title: mutisia acuminata
intro: Mutisia acuminata, also known as the Acuminata Mutisia or the Andean Mutisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Mutisia acuminata is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, and it can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements.
